message:
fix(web): make parse_bool case-insensitive for query string parameters

Accept "True", "TRUE", "Yes", "YES", etc. in addition to the lowercase
variants. Web clients and browser form submissions may produce mixed-case
boolean values, causing previously valid requests to be silently treated
as false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
